summary: Completed shell/git verification testing for hardened push_to_github.sh script. All 5 test scenarios passed successfully using local bare git repositories.
passed_tests: TEST 1: init.sh is staged and pushed correctly to remote repository
TEST 2: .gitignore does NOT ignore init.sh (verified with git check-ignore)
TEST 3: Safety guard aborts script with exit code 1 when init.sh is missing
TEST 4: Secret safety - .env is NOT pushed, .env.example IS pushed
TEST 5: Commit message is exactly 'feat: initial OpenHands + Headroom Docker stack'
